description: Beyond the Veil Patch 5 (7 March 2023) — New Twitch Drops, Crystal League Changes, Albion East Closed Beta Updates, Faction Warfare Changes, Combat Balance Changes (Arcane Staffs, Axes, Bows, Daggers, Fire Staffs, Frost Staffs, Hammers, Quarterstaffs, Swords, Helmets, Shoes), Fixes.

sections.heading: New Twitch Drops
sections.description: 19 new wardrobe skins and 2 new mount skins added to Community Chests and Vanity Merchant.
sections.searchable_text: Twitch Drops wardrobe skins mount skins Community Chests Vanity Merchant

sections.heading: Crystal League and Crystal Arena
sections.description: Crystal League match rules changing next season: Runestones now score less frequently but successfully scored Runestones reset each round. To compensate, point value per rotation is increased.
sections.searchable_text: Crystal League Crystal Arena 5v5 20v20 Runestones scoring round reset Scoring Round 60s 150s 120s 180s 1 2 3 4 5 Runestone advantage points Runestone Channel Range 4m 8m map Spade Cross

subsections.heading: 5v5 Crystal League and Crystal Arena
subsections.searchable_text: 5v5 Crystal League Crystal Arena Runestones reset round Scoring Round 60s 150s 1 Runestone 10 25 2 30 35 3 20 50 Channel Range 4m 8m map Spade

changes.raw_text: Scoring Round: 60s → 150s. Scoring: 1 Runestone advantage: 10 → 25; 2 Runestones: 10 → 35; 3 Runestones: 20 → 50. Runestone Channel Range: 4m → 8m. Map: Cross → Spade.
notes: At end of each round, all scoring Runestones reset; team with most Runestones loses them
Map changed from Cross to Spade

subsections.heading: 20v20 Crystal League
subsections.searchable_text: 20v20 Crystal League Runestones reset round Scoring Round 120s 180s 1 Runestone 10 30 2 10 45 3 20 60 4 20 75 5 60 90 Channel Range 4m 8m

changes.raw_text: Scoring Round: 120s → 180s. Scoring: 1 Runestone: 10 → 30; 2 Runestones: 10 → 45; 3 Runestones: 20 → 60; 4 Runestones: 20 → 75; 5 Runestones: 60 → 90. Runestone Channel Range: 4m → 8m.
notes: At end of each round, all scoring Runestones reset; team with most Runestones loses them

sections.heading: Albion East Closed Beta
items: Albion East downtime moved back one hour to 23:00 UTC
Faction Hearts and Faction Crests removed from Marketplace
Resource weight buff persists after knockdown
Fixed issue where Castle and Outpost Chests wouldn't spawn on Thursdays
Added Carrot Soup (1250 → 750 Silver) and Mules (20,000 → 5,000 Silver) to Royal City Marketplaces (except Caerleon)
Zones with 20:00 UTC prime time changed to 02:00 UTC
sections.searchable_text: Albion East downtime 23:00 UTC Faction Hearts Crests Marketplace resource weight knockdown Castle Outpost Chests Thursdays Carrot Soup 1250 750 Mules 20000 5000 Royal City prime time 20:00 UTC 02:00 UTC

sections.heading: Changes and Improvements
items: Faction Warfare: Static Dungeons no longer advance front line; Faction Points properly awarded in Static Dungeons/Passages; smuggling mission buff split into invisibility (20s) and silence/attack prevention (30s); Daily and Campaign Rewards unlock at 00:00 UTC
Adventurer's Challenge: Always starts at 00:00 UTC on 1st of month; Daily and Weekly Rewards unlock at 00:00 UTC
Conqueror's Challenge: Crystal Spider Might required per level doubled
UI Improvements: Travel Planner sub-menus scrollable; Sort and Quality Filter improved in Marketplace; added info button to Appearance UI
Improved matchmaking in duo Mists
Inner Shadow (Shadowcaller) on players without combat armor now behaves as it does against Cloth Armor
Time Freeze (Great Arcane) now makes mobs immune to being Time Frozen again for 5s
sections.searchable_text: Faction Warfare Static Dungeons front line Faction Points smuggling invisibility 20s silence 30s Adventurer's Challenge Conqueror's Challenge Crystal Spider doubled Travel Planner Marketplace Appearance matchmaking duo Mists Inner Shadow Shadowcaller Time Freeze Great Arcane mobs immune 5s

subsections.heading: Arcane Staffs
subsections.searchable_text: Arcane Staffs Chain Missile First Target 121 132 Bounce 60 25 Arcane Charge 61 55 Dark Sphere Evensong Debuff Duration 7s 5s

changes.raw_text: Chain Missile: First Target Damage: 121 → 132; Projectile Bounce Damage: 60 → 25; Arcane Charge Damage: 61 → 55
Dark Sphere (Evensong): Debuff Duration: 7s → 5s
Aftershock (Realmbreaker): Health Reduction: 20% → 15%

subsections.heading: Bows
subsections.searchable_text: Bows Enchanted Quiver Regular Bow reworked 6 arrows 8s attack speed 50% damage 240% 4 arrows recast Cooldown 12s Lucent Hawk Mistpiercer Damage 145 160

changes.raw_text: Enchanted Quiver (Regular Bow): Reworked — Enchant 6 arrows for the next 8s; attack speed increased 50% and normal attack damage increased 240%; recast within 8s to sidestep and enchant 4 more arrows; Cooldown: 12s
notes: Reworked: Enchant 6 arrows for the next 8s
While holding enchanted arrows, attack speed increased 50% and normal attack damage increased 240%
Auto-Attacks consume 1 Enchanted Arrow
Recast within 8s to sidestep into target direction and enchant 4 more arrows (cannot exceed 6)
Cooldown: 12s

changes.raw_text: Lucent Hawk (Mistpiercer): Damage: 145 → 160

subsections.heading: Daggers
subsections.searchable_text: Daggers Shadow Edge Cooldown 15s 20s hitting enemy player reduces 25%

changes.raw_text: Shadow Edge: Cooldown: 15s → 20s. Hitting an enemy player reduces this ability's cooldown by 25%.
notes: Hitting an enemy player reduces this ability's cooldown by 25%

Hail (Great Frost Staff): Damage: 130 → 142

subsections.heading: Hammers
subsections.searchable_text: Hammers Knockout Sleep Duration vs Players 4.36s 5s Mobs 8.72s 10s Hit delay 0.4s 0.25s Standtime 1s 0.5s

changes.raw_text: Knockout: Sleep Duration vs Players: 4.36s → 5s; Sleep Duration vs Mobs: 8.72s → 10s; Hit delay: 0.4s → 0.25s; Standtime: 1s → 0.5s

subsections.heading: Quarterstaffs
subsections.searchable_text: Quarterstaffs Whirling Strikes new Q-ability 38 damage 0.25s 5m radius 0.6s Gale Dance new W-ability 80 damage 3 swings 30% Move Speed 50% Normal Attack Damage Concussive Combo Hit Detection Separator Cast Range 3m 5m Root Duration 1.6s 2.5s removed Slow Empowered Slam Heavy Cleave

changes.raw_text: Added new Q-Ability: Whirling Strikes — Whirl staff, dealing 38 physical damage every 0.25s in a 5m radius while channeling up to 0.6s (can move while channeling). Hitting at least one enemy reduces cooldown by 0.5s for 5s (stacks up to 3 times). Cooldown 4s / Channel Duration 0.6s.
notes: Whirl your staff, dealing 38 physical damage every 0.25s in a 5m radius (can move while channeling, up to 0.6s)
Hitting at least one enemy reduces cooldown by 0.5s for 5s (stacks up to 3 times)
Cooldown: 4s

changes.raw_text: Added new W-Ability: Gale Dance — Swing your weapon up to 3 times in the target direction, dealing 80 physical damage each hit. Hitting all three increases Move Speed by 30% and Normal Attack Damage by 50% for 4s. Cooldown: 12s / Channel Duration: 1s.
notes: Swing weapon up to 3 times in target direction, dealing 80 physical damage each hit
Hitting all three increases Move Speed by 30% and Normal Attack Damage by 50% for 4s
Cooldown: 12s | Channel Duration: 1s

changes.raw_text: Concussive Combo: Improved Hit Detection of the first two hits
notes: Improved Hit Detection of the first two hits

changes.raw_text: Separator: Cast Range: 3m → 5m; Root Duration: 1.6s → 2.5s; Removed the Slow on knocked-back enemies
notes: Removed the Slow on knocked-back enemies

changes.raw_text: Removed the Ability: Empowered Slam. Removed the Ability: Heavy Cleave.
notes: Removed: Empowered Slam
Removed: Heavy Cleave

subsections.heading: Swords
subsections.searchable_text: Swords Spinning Blades Dual Swords no longer knocks airborne

changes.raw_text: Spinning Blades (Dual Swords): No longer knocks enemies airborne
notes: No longer knocks enemies airborne

subsections.heading: Helmets
subsections.searchable_text: Helmets Poison Mage Cowl reworked Firebreath 13m cone 160 magical damage 3s DoT Immortal Mistwalker Hood Cooldown 45s 30s Spider's Thread Duskweaver Helmet Standtime 0.1s 0s Thread Projectile Range 15m 17m

changes.raw_text: Poison (Mage Cowl): Reworked into Firebreath — Breathe fire in a 13m cone in front of you; enemies hit catch fire and take 160 magical damage over 3s. (Old Poison DoT damage was 180.)
notes: Ability reworked and renamed from Poison to Firebreath
Breathe fire in a 13m cone; enemies hit catch fire and take 160 magical damage over 3s
Can hit multiple targets including invisible ones; can be missed or dodged

changes.raw_text: Immortal (Mistwalker Hood): Cooldown: 45s → 30s
Spider's Thread (Duskweaver Helmet): Standtime: 0.1s → 0s; Thread Projectile Range: 15m → 17m

subsections.heading: Shoes
subsections.searchable_text: Shoes Break Free Mercenary Shoes Cooldown 25s 30s

changes.raw_text: Break Free (Mercenary Shoes): Cooldown: 25s → 30s

sections.heading: Fixes
items: Energy Cloud (Tower Chariot) now uses AoE spell indicator rather than single target indicator
Sandstorm (Bridgewatch Cape) is less likely to be triggered twice in a row by high attack speeds
Fixed issue where Lunging Stabs (Bloodletter) could trigger cooldown reduction twice

Various UI fixes: item icons stuck when scrolling inventory, party join requests while disabled, chat log in Report Player UI, item enchantments in Marketplace UI, Power Core/Energy Vortex tooltips showing '00' remaining time, laborer rewards not given when Rewards UI closed too quickly, Building UI display
Fixed issue where accounts that had not finished the tutorial could not enter the game
[Steam] In streamer mode, login credentials now hidden on character creation screen
[Controller] Fixed issue where item slots in Furniture UI could not be navigated
Minor graphical, terrain, audio, UI, and localization fixes
sections.searchable_text: Fixes Energy Cloud Tower Chariot AoE Sandstorm Bridgewatch Cape Lunging Stabs Bloodletter UI item icons inventory party join Report Player enchantments Marketplace Power Core Energy Vortex laborer rewards Building tutorial Steam streamer Controller Furniture UI graphical terrain audio localization
